task: Get Dependabot PR #333 green after rebasing and allow dependabot/ automation branches in the repository branch-prefix policy.
implementationSummary: Updated the Lychee workflow to use lycheeverse/lychee-action@v2 with repository lychee.toml as the source of link-check configuration.
Added dependabot/ to the branch-prefix allow list for automated dependency update branches.
Updated trace coverage policy so dependabot/ branches are allowed and do not require promoted trace artefacts while still keeping normal work branches trace-gated.
Updated tests for the new dependabot/ branch-prefix behaviour.
Updated operating-model documentation and GitHub bundle prompt text so the branch policy is consistent across enforcement and documentation.
Regenerated the GitHub bundle registry manifest after bundle text changed.

postMergeIssue.cause: PR #333 was checked on its dependabot/ branch, where trace coverage is deliberately skipped. After merge, main validation detected agent-significant operating-model changes in the merge diff and failed because no 2026-06-06 trace artefact existed.
postMergeIssue.correction: Add the missing promoted trace artefact for the PR #333 operating-model change.

validation.command: npm run agent:model -- "Fix failing checks on Dependabot PR 333 updating lycheeverse/lychee-action from v1 to v2"

validation.result: passed on dependabot branch because dependabot/ automation is trace-exempt
reproduced missing trace failure on merged main before this trace artefact was added

residualRisk: Future dependency PRs that modify operating-model files should include an appropriate promoted trace or have post-merge main validation simulated before being marked safe.
